allow: Bash(node -e "try { const pkg=require\('./node_modules/expo-clipboard/package.json'\); console.log\('expo-clipboard:', pkg.version\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\('not installed'\) }")

Bash(node -e "try { const pkg=require\('./node_modules/react-native-safe-area-context/package.json'\); console.log\('safe-area-context:', pkg.version\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\('not installed'\) }")
